context: Perez Textile Conservation reimbursement policy for studio assistant Samuel Okafor and any contract conservators working on-site. Covers pre-approved conservation supplies, transit costs, and professional development expenses.

validation_rules.notes: Digital photos of receipts accepted via WhatsApp; forward to jesse.perez@Finthesiss.ai.
validation_rules.requirement: Original itemized receipt must be attached to every reimbursement request.

validation_rules.notes: Aligns with the persona-wide $300 confirmation gate.
validation_rules.requirement: Any single expense at or above $300 requires written pre-approval before purchase.

validation_rules.notes: Log to Corporate Expense Ledger against Business Checking.
validation_rules.requirement: Standard archival supplies from Talas, University Products, and Gaylord Archival are pre-approved up to $300.

validation_rules.notes: Requires tracking number and delivery confirmation.
validation_rules.requirement: FedEx Custom Critical and UPS specialty handling for crated textile transport are reimbursable at cost.

validation_rules.notes: Log to Reference Library account (Id: 8).
validation_rules.requirement: Conservation monographs, exhibition catalogs, and journal reprints up to $150 per item.

validation_rules.notes: AIC and other conference bookings route through Jesse only.
validation_rules.requirement: Any travel booking requires explicit written approval regardless of cost.

validation_rules.notes: No alcohol reimbursed.
validation_rules.requirement: Working meals only; standard per diem $50 during studio deadline weekends.

validation_rules.notes: Personal commuting is not reimbursable.
validation_rules.requirement: MBTA passes and rideshare for crate escort trips only.

validation_rules.notes: Sunday batch-cook supplies for Jesse are personal, not studio.
validation_rules.requirement: Coffee, cleaning supplies, and shared kitchen items under $50 per purchase.

validation_rules.notes: Requires prior approval for course selection.
validation_rules.requirement: AIC membership dues and continuing education courses are reimbursed for studio assistants at 50%.

validation_rules.notes: Log to Client Hospitality account.
validation_rules.requirement: Curator or collector meeting refreshments up to $75 per visit.

validation_rules.notes: Any repair over $500 requires written approval.
validation_rules.requirement: Microscope calibration and humidifier servicing are pre-approved routine expenses.

validation_rules.notes: Includes personal art collection purchases from Etsy.
validation_rules.requirement: Any purchase not directly tied to studio operations is not reimbursable.

validation_rules.notes: Standard payment terms are net 30.
validation_rules.requirement: Deposits to conservation supply vendors require Jesse's approval.

validation_rules.notes: Log trip purpose and endpoints in submission.
validation_rules.requirement: Personal vehicle mileage for studio errands at IRS standard rate.

validation_rules.notes: Exceptions require Jesse's written approval.
validation_rules.requirement: Reimbursement requests must be submitted within 30 days of expense date.

validation_rules.notes: Do not email receipts to institutional Gmail.
validation_rules.requirement: Requests submitted via studio Google Drive folder with scan or photo of receipt.

validation_rules.notes: Protects client confidentiality per persona Red Line 1.
validation_rules.requirement: Client-specific supplies must not name the client on receipts or reimbursement submissions.

validation_rules.notes: Direct deposit preferred for Samuel.
validation_rules.requirement: Approved reimbursements are paid within 14 days by direct deposit or check.

validation_rules.notes: Last reviewed January 2026.
validation_rules.requirement: This policy is reviewed annually at the January business planning session.
